html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

The Oscillating Fan is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Science Tab, requires 2 Alloy, 2 Electrical Doodads and 1 Gear to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

While active, the fan prevents the effects of Hay Fever and will dry the player off very rapidly (5 times as fast) even in Fog or Rain as long as the player is within a certain range of the fan.

When crafted, the fan will display a radius for effect, similar to the Ice Flingomatic. The fan can be turned on or off, but will automatically turn off when it runs out of fuel. The player is able to refuel it with regular Fuel items along with Nitre.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Oscillating Fan can be flooded.

Bugs

  • Oscillating Fan accepts an infinite amount of fuel therefore wasting any additional fuel given that would surpass its 5 days limit.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Oscillating Fan
"Relieves hay fever, keeps you dry."
Object Info
Perk
Prevents the effects of Hay Fever.
Dries the player off.
5 days
Crafting
×2 ×2 ×1
Tab
Tier
Miscellaneous
"basefan"
“Fan-tastic.”
–Wilson
“Fan the flames.”
–Willow
“Is cool on Wolfgang skin.”
–Wolfgang
“Alas the relief it brings is only temporary.”
–Wendy
“COOLING FAN.”
–WX-78
“Restorative.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yep. That's a nice breeze.”
–Woodie
“Ah. Civilization.”
–Maxwell
“Magnificent! What a marvel of engineering!”
–Wagstaff
“Cönquers the heat!”
–Wigfrid
“That breeze feels nice on our fur.”
–Webber
“A nice breeze.”
–Walani
“Good ventilation in the kitchen is an must.”
–Warly
“A cool wind blows from thee!”
–Woodlegs
“BLOW WINDS!”
–Wilba
“Wind”
–Wormwood
“A plane propeller would be better.”
–Wheeler
The Oscillating Fan is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Science Tab, requires 2 Alloy, 2 Electrical Doodads and 1 Gear to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
While active, the fan prevents the effects of Hay Fever and will dry the player off very rapidly (5 times as fast) even in Fog or Rain as long as the player is within a certain range of the fan.
When crafted, the fan will display a radius for effect, similar to the Ice Flingomatic. The fan can be turned on or off, but will automatically turn off when it runs out of fuel. The player is able to refuel it with regular Fuel items along with Nitre.
In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Oscillating Fan can be flooded.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Oscillating Fan accepts an infinite amount of fuel therefore wasting any additional fuel given that would surpass its 5 days limit.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quạt Dao Động là một Kiến Trúc khả chế chỉ có trong Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Khoa học, yêu cầu 2 Hợp kim, 2 Doodad Điện và 1 Bánh răng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.
